cases.Case description: Motion sensors triggered at 03:15 AM. CCTV shows a person in maintenance gear attempting to bypass biometric scanners. Audit required.
Automated flags raised on three consecutive payments exceeding $50,000. Routing numbers do not match the approved vendor profile.
Multiple employees reported emails disguised as payroll updates. Three users clicked the link; endpoint isolation has been initiated.
Competitor launched a mobile app using the 'Zenith' brand name, which is currently a registered trademark in our portfolio.
Report of bypassed safety interlocks on manufacturing Line 4. No injuries reported, but formal hearing and retraining are mandatory.
